```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border-top:3px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#2C8475;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">code review</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/review</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/security-review</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border-top:3px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#2C8475;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">refactor</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/simplify</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/refactor</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.08);border-top:3px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">tests</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/tdd</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/e2e</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.08);border-top:3px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">build / verify</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/build-fix</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/verify</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.08);border-top:3px solid #D45F47;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">docs &amp; git</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FCEEEC;color:#D45F47;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/init</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FCEEEC;color:#D45F47;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/commit</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border-top:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;font-weight:700;">knowledge</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.2em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/think</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/learn</span>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  80/20 kicks in fast — optimize what you actually use
 </div>

</div>
```
